economic_notes: Nation has investments in A-Tlegay Fisheries LP (18%), Nanwakolas Carbon Credit LP (10.98%), Nanwakolas Offset LP (11.88%), Nanwakolas Timber LP (20.648%) accounted for by modified equity method. GBEs had combined revenue of $5,411,592 and net income of $1,910,725 in 2022. K'omoks First Nation Business Trust, K'omoks Economic Development Corporation, and KFN Economic Development Limited Partnership are related entities. Comox Valley Project Watershed Society made land improvements of which Nation's 51% share was $622,350 capitalized as contributed revenue.
notes: Fiscal year is 2022, not 2024. GBEs accounted for by modified equity method include 4 limited partnerships. Loans receivable of $15,477,499 are primarily inter-entity loans to related trusts and LPs. Long-term debt of $11,950 is interest-free specific claims debt owing to Government of Canada. Nation guarantees CMHC loans ($338,863) and BMO loans ($658,621) for band members. Program schedules are unaudited compilation engagements. expenses_administration includes Band Government ($2,605,814); expenses_enterprises includes Lands and Economic Development ($794,252); expenses_infrastructure includes Public Works ($518,499). total_government_transfers includes ISC ($3,324,984) + Province of BC ($795,092) + BC Treaty Commission ($985,425) = $5,105,501. Honoraria of $302,456 paid; no formal remuneration schedule provided.
